emails.subject: help
emails.body: help Sara, I've had 2 swaptions sitting on my desk for a month!!! AIGGG. They are American style swaptions, and I wasn't sure how to document that. I'll be calling you tomorrow to discuss.

emails.subject: Re: help
emails.body: Re: help Laurel: Just checking to see if we needed to meet. Sara Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Laurel Adams 01/31/2001 07:03 PM

emails.subject: Re: help
emails.body: Re: help We are requesting Chase's confirm, so we can check their format and come up with our own for EPMI. As soon as I have chase's, I'll call you to set up a time. THanks!

emails.subject: Re: help
emails.body: Why is EPMI the Enron party for a financial trade? It should always be ENA. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Laurel Adams 02/01/2001 03:15 PM
